summary: Bug fix verification complete. Both bugs fixed and verified: Bug 1 (Camera error handling) - CameraModal shows specific error messages per error type with retry button. Bug 2 (Sidebar z-index) - Sidebar z-index 9999 > Leaflet z-index 1, sidebar fully opaque bg-[#0A0A0B].
passed_tests: Desktop: Sidebar z-index = 9999 (higher than map z-index = 1) - PASS
Desktop: Sidebar background = rgb(10, 10, 11) = #0A0A0B (fully opaque) - PASS
Desktop: Carte Live map renders correctly with dark tiles - PASS
Desktop: CROISSANCE badge visible in sidebar - PASS
Mobile: Sidebar fully opaque over map - PASS
Driver: Photo button opens CameraModal - PASS
CameraModal: Shows error state when camera fails - PASS
CameraModal: Error message is descriptive ('Aucune caméra détectée sur cet appareil') not generic - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: CameraModal: Proper error handling per error.name (NotAllowedError, NotFoundError, NotReadableError) with specific French messages
CameraModal: Retry button with data-testid='retry-camera-btn' for automated testing
AdminDashboard: Sidebar z-[9999] ensures it's always above Leaflet map (z-index: 1)
AdminDashboard: Sidebar bg-[#0A0A0B] is fully opaque, no transparency
index.css: .leaflet-container z-index: 1, .leaflet-pane z-index: 2, .leaflet-top/.leaflet-bottom z-index: 3 - properly capped
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified in iteration 11. Bug 1: CameraModal now has cameraError state with specific messages per error type (NotAllowedError -> 'Permission caméra refusée', NotFoundError -> 'Aucune caméra détectée', NotReadableError -> 'La caméra est utilisée par une autre application'). Shows retry button when camera fails. Bug 2: Sidebar z-[9999] with bg-[#0A0A0B] (fully opaque), overlay backdrop z-[9998], header z-40. Leaflet containers capped at z-index 1-3 via CSS. Firestore permission errors in console are non-blocking and expected in preview environment.

mocked_apis.firestore_sync: May fail with Permission Denied in preview environment (non-blocking)

bug_1_camera_error.original_issue: Generic error message 'Impossible d'accéder à la caméra' for all camera failures
bug_1_camera_error.fix_applied: CameraModal now has cameraError state with specific messages per error.name: NotAllowedError -> 'Permission caméra refusée', NotFoundError -> 'Aucune caméra détectée', NotReadableError -> 'La caméra est utilisée par une autre application'. Retry button with data-testid='retry-camera-btn'
bug_1_camera_error.verification_status: FIXED - Error message shows 'Aucune caméra détectée sur cet appareil' in headless mode, retry button present

bug_2_sidebar_zindex.original_issue: Sidebar z-index lower than Leaflet map, map showing through sidebar on mobile
bug_2_sidebar_zindex.fix_applied: Sidebar z-[9999] bg-[#0A0A0B], overlay z-[9998], header z-40. Leaflet containers capped at z-index 1-3 via CSS
bug_2_sidebar_zindex.verification_status: FIXED - Sidebar z-index (9999) > Leaflet z-index (1), sidebar fully opaque rgb(10, 10, 11)
